identity.name: E1
identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

typography.installation_instructions: Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;600;700;900&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap');

visual_enhancers.card_scan_effect: A moving gradient line (scanning beam) overlay for the analysis phase.
visual_enhancers.holographic_overlay: CSS gradient mix-blend-overlay to simulate foil cards.

layout_strategies.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris). Mix of 1x1 (stats), 2x2 (featured card), and 2x1 (lists).
layout_strategies.analysis_page: Split View. Left: Immersive Card Viewer (Zoom/Pan). Right: Data/Grading Breakdown Panel (Scrolly).
layout_strategies.landing_hero: Centered, high-impact 'Vault' door or floating card animation. Minimal text. Massive CTA.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider h-12 px-8
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider h-12 px-8

cards.base: bg-[#121212] border border-[#27272a] rounded-lg overflow-hidden transition-all hover:border-[#3b82f6]/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]

inputs.style: bg-[#0a0a0a] border-[#27272a] focus:border-[#3b82f6] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#3b82f6] rounded-md h-12 text-white placeholder:text-gray-600

charts.style: Minimal axes, tooltip focused. Colors: Mint Green, PSA Red, Slate Blue.

motion_guidelines.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4, ease: 'easeOut' }}
motion_guidelines.scanning_beam: animate-scan (custom keyframe moving top to bottom)

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind Config: Add the custom colors (obsidian, mint, psa-red) and fonts (Barlow Condensed).
2. Component Overrides: Customize Shadcn components to remove 'rounded-xl' and use 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-md' for a sharper, more technical feel.
3. Dashboard Layout: Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the main dashboard view. Use 'recharts' for the value history graph.

4. Card Analysis View: Create a dedicated component for 'CardScanner' which takes an image, applies a scanning animation overlay, and then reveals the 4 sub-grades (Corners, Edges, Surface, Centering).
5. Dark Mode Default: Force dark mode. Do not create a light mode toggle unless strictly necessary. This is 'The Vault'.
7. Data Visualization: Use Radial Progress charts for the 4 sub-grades.
8. Mock Data: Create a robust set of mock data for the 'History' and 'Analysis' to show the UI potential (e.g., '1986 Fleer Michael Jordan', '2011 Mike Trout').

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.avoid_ai_slop: No generic gradients. Use subtle noise/grain. No 'Inter' everywhere.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.spacing: Use p-8, p-12 for containers. Let the content breathe.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
